text: PR #114 addresses 46 performance audit issues across 33 files. Most fixes are correct and well-implemented (30/46), but 4 new regressions were introduced (parse error in Header.tsx, 2 React Hooks violations in PointsHistory.tsx and CategoryPieChart.tsx, invalid useMemo deps in ProtectedRoute.tsx). Additionally, 3 critical audit issues remain unfixed (barrel imports in chart components and static tiptap import).

reasoning: 4 new regressions block merge: Header.tsx has an extra closing div (parse error), PointsHistory.tsx and CategoryPieChart.tsx place useMemo after conditional returns (Hooks violations), and ProtectedRoute.tsx useMemo deps syntax fails the linter. These must be fixed before the PR can be merged. 3 critical audit items were also not addressed but are less blocking than the new bugs.

message: ThemeToggleButton extracted from inside TopNav and replaced with import from @/components/theme/ThemeToggle — fixes the remount-on-every-render bug. Clean and correct.
Changed from blanket watch() to targeted watch('frequency'), watch('daysOfWeek'), etc. — eliminates unnecessary re-renders on every field change.
EventSeriesForm is now lazy-loaded via next/dynamic with ssr:false — keeps ~440 lines of form logic out of the initial bundle when not needed.
VolunteerRow extracted as a memoized component — prevents re-render of unchanged rows on checkbox toggle or rating change.
selectedUser moved from IIFE to useMemo — O(n) linear search only runs when users or openMenu change, not on every render.

Extra closing on line 139 causes a JSX parse error — the component is completely broken. Original {mobileOpen && (...)} conditional was replaced with a className-based hide/show, but the closing )} was not properly cleaned up.
suggestion:
Remove the extra on line 139. The mobile menu
opens at line 108 and closes at line 138 — line 139 is a leftover from the removed JSX expression wrapper.

message: useMemo called after conditional early returns (lines 50, 65, 90) — violates React Rules of Hooks. lint/correctness/useHookAtTopLevel error. This is a regression introduced by the date-formatting memoization fix.
suggestion: Move the useMemo declaration before the first early return (before line 50), or remove useMemo and compute formattedTx with a regular const (non-hook) at its current position.

message: useMemo called after conditional early return on line 42-43 — violates React Rules of Hooks. lint/correctness/useHookAtTopLevel error. The original data.map() was fine as a non-hook expression; wrapping it in useMemo pushed it after the guard clause.
suggestion: Move useMemo before the if (!data?.length) return statement, or keep the original non-hook data.map() to avoid the hook ordering issue.

message: useMemo(() => allowedRoles, allowedRoles) passes allowedRoles as the dependency array instead of [allowedRoles] — lint/correctness/useExhaustiveDependencies error (non-array-literal deps). The approach also doesn't solve the original problem because allowedRoles reference changes every render when parent passes an inline array.
suggestion: Use useMemo(() => allowedRoles, [allowedRoles]) if allowedRoles is already stabilized at the parent, or deep-compare with JSON.stringify: useMemo(() => allowedRoles, [JSON.stringify(allowedRoles)]).

message: Barrel import from top-level recharts not addressed — this file received NO changes at all. The audit flagged this as critical for tree-shaking.

Barrel import from top-level recharts (Cell, Legend, Pie, PieChart, ResponsiveContainer, Tooltip) not fixed — prevents tree-shaking, adding ~500KB to bundle. Audit suggested next/dynamic with ssr:false and subpath imports. The useMemo fix was applied but the import issue remains.

Static import of @tiptap/react and @tiptap/starter-kit not addressed — audit suggested next/dynamic lazy loading. The useCallback and memo improvements were applied but the bundle-size concern remains.
Unused import: useCallback is imported but never used in the component. lint/correctness/noUnusedImports error.
suggestion: Remove useCallback from the import on line 3.

message: useEffect dependency [volunteers.length] is more specific than the actual capture of the full volunteers array inside the effect body — the effect reads volunteers[i] for each volunteer but only depends on .length. If volunteer data updates without changing length (e.g. checkedOutAt changes), the effect won't re-run, causing stale state.
suggestion: Either add volunteers to the dependency array, or scope the effect to only depend on length if the data is known to be append-only.

message: 19 individual Lucide icon imports bound into ICONS object map not addressed — all icons bundled even if only a subset is used by a given role's navItems.
Key changed to `${stat.label}-${idx}` includes array index — triggers lint/suspicious/noArrayIndexKey warning.
suggestion: Use a unique id from the stat object instead, or combine label with another unique field.

message: Key changed to array index idx — triggers lint/suspicious/noArrayIndexKey warning.
suggestion: Use cert itself as key now that addCertification prevents duplicates, or use cert + idx.
